testsuite.name: com.commutr.dashboard.service.dashboard.PlaatsingDashboardProviderTest$CompanionUtilities

testcase.name: buildSummary with empty list returns zeros()
buildMonthLabels with year filter returns 12 months()
buildMonthLabels with empty dates returns empty()
buildMonthLabels without year filter spans full range()
